goal: 按 skill-judge 评审优化 Mainline skill

summary.title: Mainline skill 评审后强化专家边界
summary.what: 按 skill-judge 评审结果优化 skills/mainline/SKILL.md：新增集中 Hard Boundaries / NEVER 段，把 publish/sync/seal 与 Git branch push 授权彻底分开；把 setup/start 流程改成决策树；压缩通用 commit 操作说明；补充 sealed/proposed intent、未初始化、identity 缺失、branch behind、unrelated dirty files 等失败态处理。
summary.why: 上一版已经完成 skill-first 与轻量 AGENTS 分层，但 SKILL.md 仍有操作手册味，anti-pattern 分散，异常路径不够明确。把专家级边界集中化、决策树化，可以提升 skill 的知识增量和可执行性，同时降低 agent 误 init、误复用 sealed intent、误把 Mainline metadata publish 理解成 Git branch push 授权的风险。

decisions.chose: 新增集中 Hard Boundaries / NEVER 段
decisions.rationale: skill-judge 指出原有 Do not/Never 分散，关键时刻不易 recall；集中 hard boundaries 能把最高风险行为变成可扫描约束。

decisions.point: Setup 与 start 流程表达
decisions.chose: 改成 decision tree，而不是线性操作手册
decisions.rationale: Mainline 使用的难点不是命令本身，而是区分 missing CLI、未初始化、identity 缺失、已有 sealed/proposed intent、branch behind 等状态。

decisions.chose: 删除逐条 git status/diff/add/commit 教程，只保留 staged diff、只 stage intended files、保留用户未跟踪内容的边界
decisions.rationale: 这些 Git 基础操作是 activation 或 redundant；skill 应把 token 留给 Mainline 专属判断。

decisions.chose: 同时保留正文 workflow 与 NEVER 段的双重约束
decisions.rationale: 这是本轮产品修正的核心风险点，需要在触发后和执行前都被看到。

rejected.alternative: 只调几句文案，不重排结构
rejected.reason: 不能解决 skill-judge 指出的核心问题：anti-pattern 分散、failure decision tree 不足、generic procedure 占 token。

rejected.alternative: 把完整 eval/benchmark 工作流引入本轮
rejected.reason: 本轮用户要求按 review 直接改；该 skill 主要是指导性文本，定向结构检查和 quick-test 足以覆盖当前改动。

risks: Start/Setup decision tree 更强约束可能让 agent 在初始化或 repair 场景里更常停下来确认；这是为了避免误改 repo guidance/refspecs 的有意取舍。
本 follow-up intent 的 branch history 还包含上一轮 skill-first guidance 大改和 upstream hub merge；本次 fingerprint 只聚焦本轮实际编辑的 skills/mainline/SKILL.md。

anti_patterns.what: Putting Git branch push authorization only in narrative prose instead of a hard NEVER boundary
anti_patterns.why: Agent 执行收口流程时更容易 recall 集中的硬边界；只散落在 workflow 段落里会再次滑向 publish -> push 的连续动作。

anti_patterns.what: Expanding SKILL.md with generic Git tutorials
anti_patterns.why: 通用 Git 操作会稀释 Mainline 专属判断，降低 skill 的知识增量和触发后的有效性。

followups: 如果继续打磨到 A 级，可以再把 private install / distribution scaffolding 移到 reference 或 README，让 SKILL.md 更短。
后续可用 skill-judge 再跑一次正式评分，确认 D1/D3/D8 是否达到 A 档。

architectural_claims: The Mainline skill is the full workflow source of truth, while repo-local AGENTS guidance is only lightweight marker/bootstrap context.
Mainline metadata publication and Git branch push authorization are separate control planes and must stay separated in agent guidance.
Expert skill value should live in decision trees, hard boundaries, and failure handling rather than generic Git procedures.
behavioral_changes: Agents following the skill now see a concentrated Hard Boundaries / NEVER list before setup/start workflows.
Setup and task start now route through explicit state decision trees.
Commit workflow guidance is shorter and emphasizes staged-diff scope control over generic Git command tutorials.
security_implications: The skill more strongly prevents unauthorized Git branch pushes, especially main/master pushes, and discourages setup/rewire commands without explicit setup or repair intent.
migration_notes: Installed global copies of the mainline skill need reinstall/update from this branch to pick up the improved boundaries.
